name: Proofing Frozen Bread Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease loaf pan.
2. Brush the frozen bread dough with softened butter or margarine.
3. Place the dough in the prepared pan.
4. To proof, fill a small microwave-safe pitcher or cup about two-thirds full of very warm water and place it in a corner of the microwave oven.
5. Position the bread on the Micro Go Round inside the microwave.
6. Microwave at 10% (low) for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, or until the dough has doubled in size and leaves an indentation when lightly touched.
7. Bake in a conventional oven according to the instructions on the frozen bread dough package.
8. Remove from the pan and brush the top with softened butter or margarine.
9. The dough can be thawed in the refrigerator as directed on the frozen bread dough package, which will reduce the proofing time in the microwave to 25 to 30 minutes.
